content: vite-plugin-pwa automatically inherits Vite's base config option. Setting base: '/little-words/' in vite.config.ts causes the plugin to configure all SW and manifest URLs with that prefix — no manual override needed. The manifest.webmanifest and sw.js are served from the base path. For GitHub Pages: set base in vite.config.ts, set registerSW to 'auto' or 'script', configure navigateFallback for SPA routing. Hash-based routing ('#/dashboard') means no navigateFallback conflicts since the SW only needs to serve index.html. For full offline: globPatterns: ['**/*']. Note: do NOT set scope in manifest to override automatic base — let the plugin handle it.
